title: Isolation of mitochondrial DNA from cytoplasmic male sterile and maintainer lines of pearl millet, Pennisetum americanum (L.) Leeke
abstract: Mitochondrial DNA has been isolated from paired lines of pearl millet maintainer and cytoplasmic male sterile plants. Evaluation of the DNA by agarose gel electrophoresis shows that good quality DNA of high molecular weight can be obtained from mitochondria of both maintainer and male sterile pearl millet
